package.json:19:    "size:why": "size-limit --why",
package.json:69:    "@axe-core/playwright": "^4.11.2",
package.json:71:    "@size-limit/preset-small-lib": "^12.1.0",
package.json:72:    "@storybook/addon-a11y": "^8.6.0",
package.json:90:    "size-limit": "^12.1.0",
package.json:95:  "size-limit": [
package.json:97:      "name": "DS bundle(production app build)",
.storybook/main.ts:20:    "@storybook/addon-a11y",         // 無障礙檢查(對 DS 很重要)
.claude/references/audit-coverage-vs-24-checklist.md:39:| #17 unit test | 走 **story-as-test + visual-regression**(stories + `/visual-audit` Layer A + M11 interactive state walk)。補 unit = 重複 story 覆蓋,`/story-writing` earn-existence 原則視其為 noise |
.claude/references/audit-coverage-vs-24-checklist.md:58:| RTL 支援 | 第一個 RTL 產品需求 → 補 RTL audit dim + 測 logical properties |
.storybook/preview.tsx:21:    density: {
.storybook/preview.tsx:23:      description: 'UI density (ui-size + layout-space)',
.storybook/preview.tsx:60:      const density = (context.globals.density ?? 'md') as string;
.storybook/preview.tsx:64:        document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-density', density);
.storybook/preview.tsx:65:      }, [theme, density]);
.claude/references/spec-rules.md:43:適用狀態必須有明確說明 — disabled / loading / empty、dark mode / density、icon-only。不適用則明文「本元件無 X 狀態」,不沉默省略。
.claude/references/item-anatomy-recipe.md:62:**公式**:`py = (field-height - 1lh) / 2`,行高與 field-height 自動同步,density 切換無需手動調。
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:19:任一分層缺口 = 規格不完整 = Figma inspect 的替代目標沒達到。這就是為什麼 6-canonical(含 Accessibility)不是 N 個 random story,而是「足以 100% 還原元件 + 對齊世界級 a11y 章程」的最小必要切片。
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:135:**對齊世界級**:Material 3 / Polaris / Atlassian DSP 三家元件文件皆有 A11y + Keyboard 專章。散在 StateBehavior(focus/disabled)+ principles(do/don't)不夠突出,designer / audit 找 a11y 資訊需要翻多檔。
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:141:- **WCAG AA 對比 snapshot**:主要 state(default / hover / focus / disabled)對比度通過 visual-audit Layer A
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:148:- `/design-system-audit` Dim 10(a11y 覆蓋)擴充:發現 interactive 元件缺 Accessibility story → flag
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:188:- **Token-first**:所有數值以 token name 為主(如 `h-field-sm`),resolved px 值為輔助灰字。開發者只需確認 token 正確——theme / density 的值解析由系統處理
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:189:- **不含 density 雙值**:不顯示 `28px (md) / 32px (lg)`,只顯示 token name + 當前 resolved 值
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:193:- **色塊即時渲染**:使用 `var()` 內聯樣式,確保切換 dark mode / density 時自動更新
.claude/references/principle-dim-map.json:24:    "M15": { "name": "Product UI flow visual-audit coverable", "dims": [], "note": "考慮加 dim 47:檢查 stakeholder-facing OpenSnapshot story 存在" },
.claude/references/principle-dim-map.json:88:    "49": { "name": "a11y axe-core 自動 + WCAG contrast ratio", "ssot": "Storybook a11y addon + axe-core CI", "hook": "TBD" },
.claude/references/principle-dim-map.json:89:    "50": { "name": "Bundle size budget per component", "ssot": "package.json size-limit + per-component manifest", "hook": "TBD" },
.claude/references/principle-dim-map.json:90:    "51": { "name": "Theme / density visual matrix", "ssot": "visual-audit Layer B + baseline snapshot", "hook": "visual-audit Layer A chain" },
.claude/references/ui-dev-rules.md:41:| **元件內 slot**(結構性、不隨 density)| MenuItem row / Field wrapper / Dropdown item padding | Tailwind `p-N`(`p-3` / `px-2 py-1.5` 等) | item-anatomy row `px-2` / Field `px-3` |
.claude/references/ui-dev-rules.md:44:**判斷法**:padding 會隨 density/theme 變動嗎?是 → layout-space token;元件內部 layout 結構?是 → Tailwind `p-N`;跟 icon/text/token 算出來?是 → calc()/var。
.claude/references/ui-dev-rules.md:46:**禁止**:Chrome padding 硬寫 `p-4`(density 切換會壞)/ 元件內 slot 用 `p-[var(--layout-space-tight)]`(密度切換讓 row 結構跑掉)。
.claude/references/ui-dev-rules.md:60:**禁止**:Tailwind `w-4 h-4` / `size-4` 表達 icon size(是 dimension 非 semantic)/ Row 內手刻 `<Icon size={16} />` 繞過 Context(density 切換不聯動)/ 自創非 uiSize 值(`size={18}` / `size={22}`)。
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:2:name: visual-audit
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:3:description: Pixel-level visual audit for design-system components based on user-provided screenshots. Catches bug classes that code/spec audits cannot see — asymmetric padding / broken overlay positioning / gap-eaten-by-hover-bg / baseline misalignment / overflow indicator obscuring content / wrong zoom step / dark-mode token mismatch. Requires a screenshot to run; refuses to proceed on guesses. Invoke via /visual-audit when user says「視覺對齊不對」「排版有問題」「gap 好像錯了」「看起來歪了」or uploads a Storybook screenshot asking「這樣對嗎」,auto-invoked by `/design-system-audit` Phase 3 (post-fix visual verify) and `/component-quality-gate` Ship phase.
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:26:**Layer A mechanical**(`npm run visual-audit`):截圖 + WCAG + geometry。**Layer B AI**(本 skill):合理 / 一致 / 世界級對照。**Workflow**:`npm run visual-audit` → `/visual-audit` 讀 `snapshots/report.json`。詳 → [`references/audit-architecture.md`](references/audit-architecture.md)(兩層架構 + hover / focus-visible / play() coverage roadmap)。
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:33:/visual-audit           pixel-level 視覺 audit(本 skill,需 screenshot)
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:37:**關鍵切分**:visual-audit 只看 pixel,**不讀 code / 不改 code**。code / spec / cva 的事全部歸前兩 skill;視覺幾何對齊 / overlay 定位 / baseline / typography vertical rhythm 等「眼睛看得到、mechanical 量得出」的事才是本 skill scope。
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:70:- [ ] 容器 / viewport 資訊(container width / density / theme)
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:72:補齊後請 re-invoke /visual-audit,不要讓我用猜的跑 audit。
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:140:.claude/skills/visual-audit/output/{YYYYMMDD}-{component}-visual-audit.md
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:143:**檔名規則**:同一天同元件多次跑 → 加 `-v2` / `-v3`。`{component}` 用 kebab-case(對齊專案慣例),例:`20260421-date-picker-visual-audit.md`。
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:152:容器資訊: {width / viewport / density / theme}
.claude/skills/visual-audit/SKILL.md:193:Visual audit 寫到 .claude/skills/visual-audit/output/{YYYYMMDD}-{component}-visual-audit.md
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/category-templates.md:155:- `AccessibilityNotes` — 非 mechanical a11y(mechanical 留 anatomy)
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/SKILL.md:3:description: Audit product / consumer UI code (非 design-system 本身) against DS usage discipline + mindset adherence. Catches element misuse / design principle violations / token leakage / geometry bugs / a11y gaps across 6 dimensions. Invoke via /product-ui-audit when user says「audit 這個 UI」「檢查 X feature 用對 DS 嗎」「這段 code 符合設計原則嗎」,or auto-invoked by /prototype Phase 3.5 gate.
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/SKILL.md:85:  - Dialog 有 DialogTitle / DialogDescription for a11y
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/SKILL.md:111:- color contrast(不用純 color 傳 state — 要 icon / label 配合)
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/SKILL.md:184:   - URL mode:`npm run visual-audit -- --urls=<csv>`(例:`--urls=http://localhost:3000/inbox,http://localhost:3000/settings`)
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/SKILL.md:185:   - Storybook mode:`npm run visual-audit -- --scope=component:<topic>`
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/SKILL.md:187:3. **Layer B AI judgement**(chain `/visual-audit` skill):讀 `snapshots/*.png`,判斷設計合理性(視覺對齊 / 覆蓋限制 / 世界級對照 / typography hierarchy)
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/SKILL.md:189:   - Contrast AA 不過 → **P0**(a11y 強制)
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/SKILL.md:195:**何時可跳**:內部 UI(只給 engineer / admin 看,非 stakeholder / end-user)→ user 明示 skip,但建議跑一次 Layer A 抓 a11y P0。
.claude/skills/scan-similar-bugs/SKILL.md:17:- `/visual-audit` 是**單次視覺對齊** check
.claude/skills/scan-similar-bugs/SKILL.md:40:- 不做視覺 regression baseline diff(那是 `/visual-audit`)
.claude/skills/scan-similar-bugs/SKILL.md:63:| a11y missing | `<button>` 無 `aria-label` 又無 children |
.claude/skills/scan-similar-bugs/SKILL.md:79:**Playwright visual scan**(慢,適合 geometry / a11y / interaction):
.claude/skills/scan-similar-bugs/SKILL.md:167:| `/visual-audit` | 單次視覺對齊 | Phase 3 verify 用 |
.claude/skills/bug-fix-rhythm/SKILL.md:98:node scripts/visual-audit-<target>.mjs        # pixel-quantified per M32(a)
.claude/skills/bug-fix-rhythm/SKILL.md:139:| `/visual-audit` | 單次視覺對齊 | Phase 3 sub-step,本 skill 包它 |
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/references/report-template.md:9:自動 bug / 違反明確 DS 規則 / a11y 必要項缺失:
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/references/report-template.md:16:- 非 button 綁 onClick(a11y 破壞)
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/references/report-template.md:126:P0(必修,無爭議){N0 個} — token 違反 / a11y 必要缺 / 幾何鐵律違反
.storybook/addons/ds-devmode/README.md:129:- 任何 viewport / density / theme — read live computed
.claude/skills/story-writing/references/self-check.md:20:- [ ] density 切換正常(若元件屬 field-height family)
.claude/skills/ensure-canonical/SKILL.md:194:| **Carbon** | Storybook + a11y test + style lint + contribution check |
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/references/common-misuses.md:99:**正解**:必有 DialogTitle + DialogDescription(a11y 必要)。
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:11:| **A. Mechanical** | (1) 截圖每個 scenario(retina PNG → `snapshots/`)<br>(2) WCAG 對比度掃描(所有可見文字 / icon vs 底色,flag AA 不過的組合)<br>(3) DOM 幾何 assertion(等高 / 對稱 padding / 正確 gap — 讀 `scripts/visual-assertions.json` 定義) | `scripts/visual-audit.mjs`(Playwright-driven) | **npm run visual-audit** 一鍵跑,產出 `snapshots/report.json` + PNG。CI 可接(exit 1 on violation) |
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:12:| **B. AI judgement** | (1) 設計合理性(badge 位置語意對、carousel 箭頭不壓文字、zoom step 手感)<br>(2) 跨元件視覺一致(同 flex 列幾何鐵律、Family 視覺對齊)<br>(3) 世界級對照(「這跟 Figma/Notion/iOS 相比還差在哪」) | **本 skill**(`/visual-audit`),讀 `snapshots/*.png` + `report.json` 做 pattern recognition | invoke 時 AI 跑 |
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:17:1. npm run visual-audit                  # Layer A 產 snapshots + report
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:18:2. /visual-audit                         # 本 skill 讀 snapshots/ 做 Layer B 判斷
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:33:npm run visual-audit
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:36:node scripts/visual-audit.mjs --scope=component:Button
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:39:node scripts/visual-audit.mjs --scope=changed
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:42:node scripts/visual-audit.mjs --no-auto-start
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:47:- `snapshots/report.json` — `{ contrast: [], geometryViolations: [], a11yViolations: [], baselineDiff: {} }`
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:51:**核心事實**:當前 `visual-audit.mjs` 只抓「頁面 render 完 + blur activeElement + 800ms wait」後的**靜態 snapshot**——**hover / focus-visible / active / pressed / tooltip-visible / menu-open / dropdown-open 等 post-interaction state 預設不被抓到**。
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:80:    // visual-audit.mjs 在 play 完後 screenshot,可抓 hover bg
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:89:`scripts/visual-audit.mjs` 預設 wait 800ms after render — play 觸發互動後 800ms 內不應該變化(再長要拉 explicit wait)。
.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/audit-architecture.md:100:每 wave 完工後跑 `npm run visual-audit`,看 `report.json` 新增的 violation,回填 `visual-assertions.json`。
.claude/skills/deep-audit-cross-codex/SKILL.md:25:**不該 invoke**:single 元件小修(用 `/design-system-audit --scope=component`)/ 已知 surgical bug fix(用 `/bug-fix-rhythm`)/ 日常 dev(`visual-audit --scope=changed`)。
.claude/skills/deep-audit-cross-codex/SKILL.md:92:- Visual:`/visual-audit --scope=changed`(UI 改動)+ playwright pixel-quantified(M32)
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/references/audit-checks.md:129:**Severity**: P0(a11y 必要)。**Fix**: 加 `aria-label="..."`。
.claude/skills/product-ui-audit/references/audit-checks.md:149:**Severity**: P0(Dialog a11y 必要)/ P1(Popover, 可選但建議)。**Fix**: 加 Title / Description(Radix 已提供)。
.claude/skills/knowledge-prune/SKILL.md:101:- CLAUDE.md M3 說「Portal 必繼承 data-theme」;但 avatar.spec.md 說「Portal 必繼承 data-theme + data-density」— 差 `data-density`,看誰真 SSOT
.claude/skills/knowledge-prune/SKILL.md:155:- `*.spec.md` 寫 visual canonical 但無對應 playwright snapshot 或 visual-audit 覆蓋
.claude/skills/component-quality-gate/SKILL.md:64:| **D3 元件效能** | 檢查 render / memo / bundle | chain `/performance-audit` |
.claude/skills/component-quality-gate/SKILL.md:66:| **D5 視覺品質** | Layer A mechanical + Layer B AI judgement | Auto `npm run visual-audit -- --scope=component:{Name}` + chain `/visual-audit` |
.claude/skills/component-quality-gate/SKILL.md:71:1. `npm run visual-audit -- --scope=component:{Name}`(D5 Layer A:WCAG / 幾何 assertion / retina screenshot)
.claude/skills/component-quality-gate/SKILL.md:73:3. Chain `/visual-audit`(D5 Layer B):讀 `snapshots/{Name}-*.png` 做 AI judgement

.claude/skills/visual-audit/references/visual-checklist.md:8:- 容器寬度 / viewport / density / theme 必先向 user 確認(SKILL.md Preconditions 項 3)
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:3:description: Systematic audit of this design system for world-class quality. Runs 46 audit dimensions covering spec hygiene / code correctness / a11y / naming / tokens / patterns / CLAUDE.md consistency / Layout Family compliance / prop value collisions / shadcn alias leakage / home-name-vs-scope fit / spec hardcoded-values, and surfaces actionable fix lists. Has explicit checkpoints where the skill MUST stop and ask user. Invoke via /design-system-audit when asked to audit, re-audit, check quality, or verify design system health.
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:21:| D5 視覺 | `/visual-audit`(Layer A mechanical + B AI) |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:53:| 7 | **Spec Rule B 邊界案例** | Missing disabled/loading/empty/dark mode/density/icon-only coverage (apply scope defaults) |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:54:| 8 | **7-維度 對標覆蓋** | Each spec covers the 7 world-class dimensions: 何時用 / 何時不用 / 近親元件分界 / 常見誤解 / 相關 links / 空值 / 驗證時機 / Loading / a11y 預設 |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:61:| 10 | **a11y 基本覆蓋** | icon-only without `aria-label`, interactive elements without ARIA role, missing keyboard handlers |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:69:| 13 | **Anatomy Figma-inspect 完整度** | 5 mandatory sections present / token-first / dev language / no density dual / live swatches |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:167:| 49 | **a11y axe-core 自動跑 + contrast ratio**(Storybook a11y addon + Carbon AVT + Atlassian linters)| Per `*.stories.tsx` 跑 axe-core via Storybook a11y addon;WCAG AA contrast ≥ 4.5:1(text)/ 3:1(large text / UI)。Carbon 每 PR 跑 AVT,Atlassian 季度 audit + linter integration。本 dim 缺 = a11y 漏在 spec.md 寫了但無自動驗 |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:168:| 50 | **Bundle size budget per component**(Material UI size-limit / Material Web public tracking / Ant tree-shake)| Per component gzip size 上限(eg. Button ≤ 5KB / DataTable ≤ 50KB);CI fail if regress > 10%。對齊 size-limit pkg + Carbon export audit。需建 `package.json` `size-limit` 段 + per-component manifest |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:169:| 51 | **Theme / density visual matrix**(Material 3 dynamic color / Apple HIG Dynamic Type)| Deep mode 每 core story 跑 light/dark/high-contrast/density-md/density-lg/RTL 6-cell matrix screenshot diff;baseline drift > Δ% → flag。對齊 Polaris visual regression / Carbon dark token matrix |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:275:| **P1 (batch-fix + review)** | Rule A / 人話 / shadcn passthrough holes / a11y missing aria-label / anatomy missing section | 每組一個 commit，改完立刻 review |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:294:每 fix group:Edit(非 Write)→ `npx tsc --noEmit` pass → commit 描述性 message。Typical groups:cva drift / Spec Rule A / a11y / Anatomy / CLAUDE.md contradiction。
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:302:| 3.5a | D5 視覺 | `npm run visual-audit` Layer A → `/visual-audit` Layer B | violation 開新 commit 修回圈 |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:304:| 3.5c | D4 UX | `/ux-audit` | P0 a11y 必修 / P1 triage |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:334:**Common FP**:Agent hallucinate fix → cross-check file:line;Rule B 多 scope-N/A → 套 CLAUDE.md 預設不 stub;cva FP → 只在 spec/anatomy 與 code 矛盾才報;Story aria-label/cva → 排除;a11y over-flag → Radix 已處理,wrapper 不重複;Skip Checkpoint 1 → mechanical change scope 不清。
.claude/skills/deep-audit-cross-codex/references/phase-a-workflow.md:97:| Visual | `/visual-audit --scope=changed` | playwright snapshot diff Δ < 0.1% |
.claude/skills/prototype/SKILL.md:60:- Key mechanics:layout / interaction pattern / states / a11y
.claude/skills/prototype/SKILL.md:96:**Process**: for each candidate,score on 4 axes(see `references/evaluation-matrix.md`):
.claude/skills/prototype/SKILL.md:187:- D1-D5 chain `/product-ui-audit` / `/performance-audit` / `/ux-audit` / `/visual-audit`
.claude/skills/component-quality-gate/references/checklist.md:20:- [ ] 邊界案例覆蓋(disabled / loading / empty / dark mode / density / icon-only 適用時)
.claude/skills/component-quality-gate/references/checklist.md:22:- [ ] 對標世界級 DS 的 7 個維度(何時用 / 分界 / 常見誤解 / 相關 / 空值 / 驗證時機 / a11y)
.claude/skills/codex-collab/SKILL.md:186:3. **Edge cases**:boundary conditions / null path / empty input / race / concurrent state / a11y(keyboard / screen-reader) / dark mode / density / RWD viewport — 至少跑 5 條
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:187:**Rationale home**: N/A — tokens bypass breaks dark mode / density / brand-swap
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:248:- density (flag only if not using field-height/layout-space tokens)
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:264:**Canonical source**: `.claude/rules/spec-rules.md` → 對標世界級 DS 七維度 (何時用 / 不用 / 近親分界 / 誤解 / 相關 / 空值 / 驗證時機 / Loading / a11y)
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:277:7. Loading / 無障礙預設 (loading / a11y defaults)
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:319:## 10. a11y 基本覆蓋
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:326:Your job: audit packages/design-system/src/components/ for a11y basics.
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:341:End: `N files checked, M a11y gaps, top offenders: [list]`. Under 500 words. Don't fix.
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:426:- Density dual values (`md density / lg density` columns) — CLAUDE.md forbids
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:443:- `ComponentName L3: density dual values in SizeMatrix column`
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:702:**背景**:pixel-level 視覺對齊無法 grep(需 visual regression 工具,長期基建 tech debt)。但「stories 自刻 `absolute + translate-y-1/2` 繞過 DS 元件的 loading / overlay / search 等 pattern」是**強信號**——這類 hand-craft 在不同 size / density 下視覺對齊跑掉,是視覺 bug 的上游。本 dim 抓 hand-craft 反 canonical 路徑,預防視覺 bug 進 production。
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1177:## 49. a11y axe-core 自動跑 + WCAG contrast ratio(2026-05-17 新增,codex Q5 verdict)
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1179:**Type**: Absolute / **Canonical**: WCAG AA(4.5:1 text / 3:1 UI)/ **Home**: spec.md「a11y 預設」段(escape rationale)
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1181:Per `*.stories.tsx` 跑 axe-core via Storybook a11y addon;contrast ≥ 4.5:1(text)/ 3:1(large text / UI element)。對齊 Carbon AVT 每 PR + Storybook a11y addon + Atlassian linter integration。需 install `@storybook/addon-a11y` + CI integration。
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1185:**Type**: Absolute / **Canonical**: `package.json` `size-limit` 段 + per-component manifest / **Home**: spec.md「bundle impact」段
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1187:Per component gzip size 上限(eg. Button ≤ 5KB / DataTable ≤ 50KB);CI fail if regress > 10%。對齊 Material UI `size-limit` + Material Web 公開 tracking + Ant tree-shake article + Polaris bundle audit。需 `size-limit` pkg integration。
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1189:## 51. Theme / density visual matrix(2026-05-17 新增,codex Q5 verdict)
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1191:**Type**: Absolute(deep mode only)/ **Canonical**: visual-audit Layer B + baseline snapshot / **Home**: spec.md「邊界案例」段
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1193:Deep mode 每 core story 跑 light/dark/high-contrast/density-md/density-lg/RTL 6-cell matrix screenshot diff;baseline drift > 5% pixel-diff → flag。對齊 Polaris visual regression + Carbon dark token matrix + Material 3 dynamic color + Apple HIG Dynamic Type。Chain `/visual-audit --scope=all --matrix=theme-density-rtl`。
.claude/skills/delivery-handoff/SKILL.md:3:description: Generate stakeholder-ready handoff documentation when a product / feature is confirmed final. Produces Storybook handoff page + UI flow diagram + component usage inventory + token consumption report + a11y checklist + per-screen spec — a Figma-like inspectable delivery package. Invoke via /delivery-handoff when user says「要交付」「handoff」「交付文件」「給 X 團隊的文件」「產品確認要上線了」. **只在產品確認 final 後才 invoke**,非 prototype 階段。
.claude/skills/delivery-handoff/SKILL.md:89:   - color contrast(此層 AI 報 visible,人工 review 判 final)
.claude/skills/delivery-handoff/SKILL.md:147:- ✓ color contrast 通過 WCAG AA
.claude/skills/delivery-handoff/SKILL.md:161:- **Inventory**: 元件 / token / a11y 報告
.claude/skills/delivery-handoff/SKILL.md:222:- **A11y checklist 自動判 pass**:checklist 只能「visible hits」,color contrast / keyboard 實測需人工
.claude/skills/delivery-handoff/SKILL.md:229:- [references/inventory-checklist.md](references/inventory-checklist.md) — 元件 / token / a11y 清單 + grep pattern
.claude/skills/prototype/references/benchmark-sources.md:14:| **Material 3** | Google | 跨平台 / a11y 最完整 / motion spec | m3.material.io |
.claude/skills/prototype/references/benchmark-sources.md:20:| **Base Web** | Uber | mobility / high-density data tables | baseweb.design |
.claude/skills/prototype/references/benchmark-sources.md:31:| **Radix UI** | 無樣式 primitive,a11y / keyboard 最完整 |
.claude/skills/prototype/references/benchmark-sources.md:32:| **React Aria** | Adobe 的 a11y-first hook 集 |
.claude/skills/prototype/references/benchmark-sources.md:63:| **Web A11y (WCAG)** | keyboard / screen reader / color contrast |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:67:**First seen**: Tabs / SegmentedControl / Sidebar anatomy size tables had `md density / lg density` columns showing `28→32px` dual values.
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:71:**Why it recurs**: Authors want to be thorough. But CLAUDE.md explicitly forbids — anatomy reflects *current* density (re-rendered on density switch); dual columns are noise. Token name is enough.
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:117:| 10. a11y 基本覆蓋 | Missing aria-label | Non-button onClick |
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:175:- **FileViewer 初版多 round 反覆修 AR26-38**(2026-04-20):初版出給人看前沒跑進階稽核 / 沒截圖全 state 驗證 → 後續 user 發現 8+ 項問題分多輪修;若 merge 前過了 `/component-quality-gate` Phase 4.5 進階模式 + `/visual-audit` Layer A + Layer B,多數問題應當場攔下
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:198:DropdownMenu 在 dark subtree 變亮(theme 未 forward);density 規則:部分 overlay(Popover / Tooltip)刻意 lock `md` 非 inherit(density.spec.md 明訂);未來任何 Portal 元件都要檢視。
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:207:2026-04-20 FileViewer 初版不看 action-bar spec / button 間距錯 / dismiss 用 Button / header 沒 token / 視覺不整齊就上給人看;被 user 發現 AR26-38 共 8+ 項。若 merge 前過 /component-quality-gate Phase 4.5 進階模式 + /visual-audit 兩層,多數應當場攔下。
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:213:2026-04-22 item-anatomy Inline Action vs Button predicate 疊代 4 次(position-based → density 分界 → fixed-small → chrome corner exception),每次 user 拉回才補對照。若 M8 存在,第一次就該先 benchmark Material IconButton / Polaris Button plain / Atlassian IconButton / Ant Button type=text 的位置規則再訂 rule。
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:233:### M15 — Product UI flow 必須 visual-audit coverable
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/historical-bugs.md:234:2026-04-22 Sheet / FileViewer 過去只有 trigger button stories,visual-audit 跑 `--scope=component:Sheet` 只截到 trigger 未 open state,被 user 點破「能抓到點擊打開的 modal 嗎?」才補 OpenSnapshot。若 M15 存在,新元件建立時就該有 OpenSnapshot。
scripts/runtime-verify-bulk-action-bar.mjs:30:// 對齊 visual-audit.mjs STORYBOOK_URL pattern。env override 支援(env STORYBOOK_URL=http://...)。
.claude/skills/prototype/references/checkpoints.md:17:Constraints:{mobile? a11y? 時程?}
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/checkpoints.md:26:- a11y aria-label 缺失: E 處
.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/checkpoints.md:52:- a11y audit 發現 7 個元件無 focus-visible，但 CLAUDE.md 沒明訂 focus ring 規則
.claude/skills/ux-audit/SKILL.md:10:現有 `/design-system-audit`(code/spec)+ `/visual-audit`(pixel)+ `/performance-audit`(render)**都不看行為**。interaction canonical、keyboard nav、focus trap、animation timing 這類 bug:
.claude/skills/ux-audit/SKILL.md:24:| Release cut | 進階 + 全 DS | 全 DS 的 a11y / interaction 全掃 |
.claude/skills/ux-audit/SKILL.md:81:1. **Null-safety**:`null / undefined` label/value/children 不 crash(e.g. `{label}` 為 undefined render 空字串,不 `Cannot read properties of undefined`);空 array `.map()` 不 crash;emoji / 超長單字 / RTL 字元不爆版

.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:13:| **C. Auto-integrate pipeline** | M14 / M19 / M31 | 對話結論 5-layer / trigger phrase auto-pipeline / claude-codex 5-step |
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:20:**Why no merge content**:per codex Q-13「Keep M24/M25 because they are sharp, reusable state/chain invariants」+ Layer A own 認 cluster headers 是檢索輔助,不該強行 merge content(各 M-rule 已 1-line tight)。Cluster headers help 「舉一反三」without 削減 M-rule 數量。**Task #19 M21-M29 meta-merge analysis(2026-05-10 closed)**:re-audit M21-M31 全部,verdict **無 merge candidate**,各 rule sharp invariant 覆蓋 distinct failure mode(M22 implement-time cite vs M26 propose-time cite / M30 wrapper-primitive 跟 M27 framework-vs-DS / M31 collab discipline 跟 M14 / M19 auto-pipeline 各 unique scope)。Cluster table 已 cross-link,不需 merge。
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:53:| **M13** | **User 第 2 次提相關問題 → 自動截圖 verify**。當 user 就同一視覺 / 行為主題第 2 次問 / 糾正,AI 必 invoke 截圖 verify(`visual-audit.mjs --scope=component:XXX`)。第 3 次才 verify = 違反。**Corollary**:user 指定「所有 X 都要 Y」,同 session 全部做完 + 建 hook 防線。 | avatar-NameCard migration 分批拖延 user 第 2 次催才全改 |
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:54:| **M14** | **對話結論 → AUTO integrate pipeline**(不等 user 催)。每次 canonical / 設計決策 / 新 rule 結論時必執行 5-layer pipeline ≥ 3 層落地:M8 benchmark / SSOT home 識別 / spec / code / hook / CLAUDE.md / memory / 驗證。User 問「有沒有整合到 X」= M14 violation。**Governance auto-trigger**(2026-04-28): `session_start_governance_check.sh` 檢查 hook 數 > 25 / memory > 18 / CLAUDE.md > 600 / 上次 prune > 90 天 任一達標 → 自動 inject「建議 /knowledge-prune」directive(soft 提示;hard cap 30/20/800/180 升 BLOCKER)。 | chrome-header / dismiss / hoverCard 每個都 user 提醒才整合 |
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:59:| **M19** | **Trigger phrase auto-pipeline**。「確保 / 一定 / 永不漂移 / ensure / always」trigger → 自動 5-layer ≥ 3 層落地 + M8 + M17 + M10。Substantive 走 STOP。SSOT → `.claude/skills/ensure-canonical/SKILL.md`。 | story splitting 2026-04-26 user 第 N 次強調才落地 |
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:60:| **M20** | **AI 自問 best-practice + 自動 self-improve**(不靠 user 提醒)。Stop hook `rule_infra_best_practice_score`(R5 in `stop_passive_logging.sh`,2026-05-13 folded from retired `stop_meta_self_audit.sh`)每 turn 跑 score → < 80 / regression ≥ 5 log to `score-history.jsonl`;next-turn UserPromptSubmit `inject_pending_self_audit.sh` 注入 BLOCKER prompt。**Threshold canonical SSOT**(2026-05-09 unified):CLAUDE.md ≤ 200 / hooks **26 soft / 35 hard**(SSOT = `session_start_governance_check.sh:173`,2026-05-17 升 30→35:DS governance complexity 升,32 hooks 全 active 無 dead candidate justified higher count;2026-05-15 曾升 25→26 soft)/ path-scoped rules used。 | user 10 次問「best-practice 嗎」直到外部 benchmark 確認真 gap |
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:67:<!-- M27 retired 2026-05-15(per /knowledge-prune D3 audit):self-flagged「M23 子規則」 → collapsed into M23 sub-bullet (c) "framework prop name namespace conflict"。Original case (TanStack size vs DS density) + hook `check_data_table_size_num_to_meta_width.sh` retained 在 M23 children。 -->
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:72:| **M32** | **Audit script 必 pixel-quantified verify ≠ attribute existence**(2026-05-12)。Audit 必驗 `rect.top / .left / .height` numeric pixel,**不**可只驗 `getAttribute('data-state')` / `class.includes(...)` = false-positive trap(DOM-pass ≠ visual-pass)。對齊 Material X-DataGrid / AG Grid playwright pixel snapshot / Polaris visual diff canonical。Hook `check_pixel_quantified_audit.sh` 機械強制(scans `getAttribute(` without paired `getBoundingClientRect(`)。**Split note**:原 mega 8 sub-invariants 拆 4 home — (b) fix-time root-invariant → M12 extension / (c)(d)(h) batch + parallel + claim-verify → `/bug-fix-rhythm` skill / (e) tool preflight → memory `feedback_tool_binary_preflight_sweep.md` / (f) ship gate → CLAUDE.md `# 稽核 canonical` / (g) Layer marker → M31 + hook。git blame 2026-05-12 commit 留 audit trail。 | 2026-05-12 4 audit-vs-visual gap absorbed:cell-align / divider 2px / breadcrumb tooltip / row-alignment 全 audit「Δ=0 ALL PASS」但 user 抓視覺壞(詳 historical-bugs.md)。|
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:74:| **M33** | **Stop hook overfire → AI conservative-defer 反 pattern**(2026-05-13 absorbs 本 session 12+ claim-verify-gap BLOCKER fires + AI 反覆「下個 session」 deferral)。**Root cause**:同 stop hook fire ≥ 5 次 within session → AI 認知 conditioned response「避免下次 fire」→ 每 reply 自動 hedge / 撤回 claim / 「下個 session」defer **可做工作**(non-blocking technical work)。**真理由 vs 偽 prereq 區辨**:(a)真 prereq 缺(cross-frame test fixture / Avatar consumer audit / Windows 真機)= 具體 deliverable need;(b)偽 prereq(「context budget」「省工」「下個 session」)= conditioned hedge,**user 反覆催 = 真理由不存在**。**Rule**:AI reply 含「下個 session」「context budget」「省工」keyword 且**前 1 turn user 已拍板**「全部做完」/「繼續」/「沒理由不做」keyword → BLOCKER「真理由必具體 deliverable 否則 continue work」。對齊 Atlassian「stop using vague defer」+ Linux kernel patch review「concrete blocker or ship」canonical。Hook `stop_self_audit.sh` 升 P0 偵測「defer keyword + prior user push-back keyword」雙條件 + inject context「revert 'next session' framing + just retract claim + continue work」。 | 2026-05-13 本 session:claim-verify-gap stop hook fire 12+ 次 → 我每 reply 自動 hedge → user 多次糾正「沒理由不做」「為啥這裡不能是下個 session」「擔憂是什麼」直到我承認 conditioned response 非技術 prereq;最終(b)路徑「explicit cite + accept hook fire + continue work」破解,1 turn 內 ship R6 v1 cross-frame runtime verify PASS。 |
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:80:**Triple test before merge new hook**(propose-time gate):
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:81:1. **Spec rule wording**:該 hook 對應 spec.md 規則的 wording 是「一般類別」(broad)還是「特定 keyword」(narrow)?
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:83:3. **Gap check**:Spec broad + Hook narrow → **本身就是 gap**,不論跑多少次 audit 都漏。必擴 hook regex(加 unicode pattern / negative-list approach / counter-example DS-wide scan)。
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:91:**修法**:hook 升 Python unicode 中英夾雜 detector + exempt list(framework/brand/DS API)+ common-word jargon trigger(row/overlay/tag/chrome/...)。詳 `check_story_invariants.sh:354-396` 升級版。
.claude/rules/meta-patterns.md:93:**Future-proof**:propose 新 hook 必先寫 3-column table:`Spec wording` / `Hook regex` / `Gap?(broad-vs-narrow)`。Gap → 改 broader implementation 或 codify narrower spec wording 後再 ship hook。

.claude/rules/self-verify.md:12:| **Mid-edit** | (1) 每 5-8 個檔案或跨新 domain 跑 scoped invariant grep(2) 發現 spec/code 衝突 STOP,不選邊(3) Hook 自動 intercept(check_substantive_edit_approval_preflight / check_solo_workflow / check_story_invariants 等)| auto-fire hooks |
.claude/rules/self-verify.md:13:| **Post-edit** | (1) `npx tsc -b`(任何 tsx/ts 改)(2) 相關 invariant script(`node scripts/data-table-invariants.mjs` 若動 DataTable / `node scripts/audit-content-quality.mjs --check` 若動 spec)(3) M10 proactive scan(`/scan-similar-bugs` 或 manual grep 同 pattern DS-wide)(4) UI 改動加 visual probe(`/visual-audit --scope=changed` 或 Playwright screenshot)(5) M14 5-layer pipeline(spec / hook / SKILL / CLAUDE.md / memory 該動的同步)| `tsc` / `*.mjs` 腳本 / visual-audit |
.claude/rules/self-verify.md:14:| **Pre-commit / Pre-final** | (1) Claim-verify table:每「已修」「已驗」對應具體 command + artifact + file:line(2) 過 `scripts/audit-content-quality.mjs --check`(3) Stop hook BLOCKER 紅燈通過(claim-verify-gap / codex-verify / codex-transport)(4) Commit message 含 cite + verdict keyword 滿足 `check_codex_collab_5step.sh` | claim-verify table + content-quality + stop hook |

packages/design-system/src/README.md:17:所有 DS 內容必屬於某個子 dir(tokens / components / patterns / hooks / stories-helpers)。即使跨 pattern 的 taxonomy(如 4-Family Model)也住在最相關的 pattern topic 資料夾內(`patterns/element-anatomy/element-anatomy.spec.md`)—— 這樣 folder = topic home,不需要頂層 flat 檔案。
packages/design-system/src/README.md:28:| Tool-level 機械檢查 | `.claude/hooks/` |
.claude/hooks/README.md:1:# .claude/hooks/ Charter
.claude/hooks/README.md:5:每個 hook 是一個 shell / python script,在 Claude Code tool event 上自動觸發:
.claude/hooks/README.md:23:| `check_story_invariants.sh` | stories 合一 invariant 檢查(anatomy / slot-split / category / principles canonical — 2026-05-10 已合併 5 個 sub-hook) |
.claude/hooks/README.md:39:| `post_edit_dispatcher.sh` | **Dispatcher**(2026-05-13 prune):一次 orchestrate 8 個 lib helper(token_hygiene / hardcoded_strings / code_quality / layout_space / person_data / overlay_handcraft / cva_default_sync / story_compile_drift)— hook count 32 → 24 |
.claude/hooks/README.md:43:| `log_governance_fires.sh` | 治理檔 fire log 寫入 `.claude/logs/hook-fires.jsonl`(L2 anti-bloat) |
.claude/hooks/README.md:49:| `log_skill_invokes.sh` | skill invoke log(本 hook 僅捕 Skill tool 呼叫,slash-command 走 user prompt 不被捕 — known limitation) |
.claude/hooks/README.md:55:| `stop_passive_logging.sh` | **Dispatcher**(2026-05-13 prune):一次跑 5 rule(tsc sanity / harvest corrections / capture metrics / governance drift / infra best-practice score)— stop hook count 3 → 2 |
.claude/hooks/README.md:71:| `inject_pending_self_audit.sh` | 讀 stop_self_audit / stop_meta_self_audit silent log,dedup + 24h filter + 3KB cap,inject 到 next turn additionalContext。修補 Stop hook silent-log 不 inject 的 known issue。 |
.claude/hooks/README.md:73:### Helper(非註冊 hook)
.claude/hooks/README.md:77:| `_log-fire.sh` | 各 hook source 的 fire-logging helper |
.claude/hooks/README.md:82:- **L2 Per-commit**:`log_governance_fires.sh` → `.claude/logs/hook-fires.jsonl`(governance file 編輯軌跡)+ `log_skill_invokes.sh`
.claude/hooks/README.md:89:| 需要 AI 走流程才能判斷的規則 | `.claude/skills/` | hook 只能機械判斷,複雜 workflow 屬 skill |
.claude/hooks/README.md:90:| 每 session signal rule | `CLAUDE.md` | hook 是 tool-level,不是 session-level |
.claude/hooks/README.md:91:| 單一元件的 lint rule | 該元件 spec + code | hook 是跨元件系統級,單元件屬 spec |
.claude/hooks/README.md:93:## 新 hook 的 criteria(必須全部通過)
.claude/hooks/README.md:98:4. **失敗模式安全**(hook 掛掉不會 block 合法操作 / 誤殺)
.claude/hooks/README.md:102:新 hook 必須在 `.claude/settings.json` 的 `hooks.PreToolUse` / `hooks.PostToolUse` / `hooks.Stop` / `hooks.SessionStart` 陣列註冊,並用 `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` 作為路徑前綴。範例:
.claude/hooks/README.md:107:  "command": "bash \"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/your-hook.sh\""
.claude/hooks/README.md:115:- `stdout` with `{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"...","additionalContext":"..."}}` — non-blocking context injection
.claude/hooks/README.md:117:## 已修(2026-04-28):Stop hook → UserPromptSubmit inject 鏈路
.claude/hooks/README.md:119:**症狀**:Stop hooks(`stop_self_audit` / `stop_meta_self_audit`)silent-log 但不 inject,M14 / M20 的「auto-inject corrective prompt」 不生效 → AI reactive 模式持續。
.claude/hooks/README.md:121:**修法**:加 `inject_pending_self_audit.sh` 註冊在 UserPromptSubmit hook(該 event 確認支援 `hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext`)。鏈路:
.claude/hooks/README.md:134:**Self-test**:`bash .claude/hooks/tests/test_inject_pending_self_audit.sh`(5/5 pass)。
.claude/hooks/README.md:138:`retired/` 目錄存舊 hook(不再註冊),保留 reference 不刪除。當前已 retire 的 hook 不在本 inventory 列出 — 以 `settings.json` 為 SSOT。
.claude/hooks/README.md:145:本 README + 最接近的既有 hook 當範本 + CLAUDE.md `# 治理 canonical` 的 Hook 章節。
.claude/hooks/check_naming_and_abstraction.sh:2:# Naming + abstraction unified hook(2026-05-08 cluster D consolidation)
.claude/hooks/check_naming_and_abstraction.sh:4:# Merges 3 PreToolUse hooks(原各檔已 retire,合併入此):
.claude/hooks/check_naming_and_abstraction.sh:10:# 散裝是 M17 + Anthropic ≤ 15 hook best-practice 偏離。
.claude/hooks/check_naming_and_abstraction.sh:22:source "$(dirname "$0")/_log-fire.sh" 2>/dev/null && log_hook_fire
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:3:# UserPromptSubmit hook: 把上 turn Stop hook 累積的 warnings inject 到 next turn additionalContext.
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:5:# 修補 known issue:Stop hook silent-log 沒 inject → AI 看不到 self-audit warnings → reactive 模式持續。
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:19:source "$(dirname "$0")/_log-fire.sh" 2>/dev/null && log_hook_fire
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:48:  # UserPromptSubmit hook 從 stdin JSON 讀 transcript_path
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:166:🚨 **DIRECTIVE — M19 trigger phrase auto-pipeline 啟動**:
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:178:  你說 done / verified / 通過 但本 turn 沒跑 \`tsc -b\` / hook test / score script。**現在立刻跑驗證**或在回答中明撤回 claim。"
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:185:→ 這些是 stop hook 偵測到、應該主動處理的事項。在你回答 user prompt 前先處理(grep / fix / invoke skill / 跑驗證),不要等 user 提醒。' "$CTX_PARTS" "$DIRECTIVE")
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:198:  hookSpecificOutput: {
.claude/hooks/inject_pending_self_audit.sh:199:    hookEventName: "UserPromptSubmit",
packages/design-system/src/tokens/uiSize/uiSize.spec.md:72:**audit hook 未來擴展**:若 cva `defaultVariants.size` 不是 `md`,或 `size` variants 的數值不命中 `--field-height-*`,hook 可要求 spec.md 必有符合格式的 rationale 段,否則 block merge(列為 post-Phase-2 可考慮加上的 mechanical gate)。
.claude/hooks/check_tab_lg_chrome_header_equal.sh:8:# PreToolUse(Edit / Write)hook —— 編輯 `packages/design-system/src/tokens/uiSize/uiSize.css` 或
.claude/hooks/check_tab_lg_chrome_header_equal.sh:11:# 對齊 M31 codex 比稿 Step 5「保留 duplicated literals + audit hook assert equality」decision。
.claude/hooks/check_tab_lg_chrome_header_equal.sh:13:source "$(dirname "$0")/_log-fire.sh" 2>/dev/null && log_hook_fire
.claude/hooks/log_skill_invokes.sh:9:# 無本 hook,skill-invokes.jsonl 永遠空,governance-health 無法做 skill-level 決策。
.claude/hooks/log_skill_invokes.sh:12:# Per-hook fire logging(enables /knowledge-prune D2 dead-hook detection)
.claude/hooks/log_skill_invokes.sh:13:source "$(dirname "$0")/_log-fire.sh" 2>/dev/null && log_hook_fire
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:3:# SessionStart hook: check if governance hygiene actions are overdue; if so,
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:14:#     to be /knowledge-prune(SessionStart hooks cannot truly block session,
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:24:# Per-hook fire logging(enables /knowledge-prune D2 dead-hook detection)
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:25:source "$(dirname "$0")/_log-fire.sh" 2>/dev/null && log_hook_fire
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:38:  # 2026-04-26 tightened thresholds(對應 M19 + user 質問「auto self-improve」要更主動):
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:133:# Check 5: Fire-weighted test gap(G7)— hooks with fires > 100 but no test
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:134:FIRES_LOG="$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs/hook-fires-per-hook.jsonl"
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:135:TESTS_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/tests"
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:137:  # Top hot hooks by fire count(讀近 10000 lines 防 log 太長跑太久)
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:139:    | jq -r '.hook // empty' 2>/dev/null \
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:152:    REMINDERS="${REMINDERS}\n- Fire-weighted test gap(hook > 100 fires 仍無 test):${HOT_GAPS}\n  推力:寫 \`.claude/hooks/tests/test_<name>.sh\`,參考 test_check_story_anatomy.sh。"
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:160:# Lib helpers renamed `_<name>.sh` 並 fold under `post_edit_dispatcher.sh`(1 registered hook)。
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:161:# Find rule 排除 `_*` 因 _ prefix 表「非 first-class hook,由 dispatcher orchestrate」—
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:162:# 對齊 `_log-fire.sh` 既有 exclusion 原則。Settings.json 中 _* files 不可作 hook registration。
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:165:HOOKS_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks"
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:174:  BLOCKERS="${BLOCKERS}\n- Hook count ${HOOK_COUNT}(hard 35 — Anthropic guideline ~15;含 root + lib/,排 retired/tests/). 2026-05-17 升 30→35:audit Dim 19 抓 32 hooks 全 active 有 fire(無 6-month 0-fire candidate),DS governance complexity(53 dims + 32 M-rules + codex collab + cross-family canonical)justified higher count。/knowledge-prune REQUIRED FIRST ACTION 評估 retire / consolidate."
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:177:  # 26 wired hooks reflects M30 wrapper-schema-drift 新增 dedicated hook(justified evolution
.claude/hooks/session_start_governance_check.sh:250:printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":%s}}\n' "$ESCAPED"
.claude/hooks/stop_self_audit.sh:3:# Stop hook: AI self-audit — detect 3 anti-patterns + inject corrective context.
.claude/hooks/stop_self_audit.sh:6:#    in transcript but no verify cmd(tsc / hook test / compile / audit)ran this turn
.claude/hooks/stop_self_audit.sh:10:#    /ensure-canonical reminder(M19 trigger phrase auto-pipeline)
.claude/hooks/stop_self_audit.sh:12:# Why: M14 / M19 markdown rules rely on AI memory(unreliable). 本 hook 是 mechanical

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba .claude/hooks/lib/_token_hygiene.sh | sed -n '1,130p' && rg -n \"utility-registry|registry|text-xs|rounded-xl|tracking-|gap-px|font-semibold\" .claude/hooks/lib/_token_hygiene.sh .claude/hooks/check_token_hygiene.sh 2>/dev/null" in /Users/chenqiren/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-qijenchen@gmail.com/我的雲端硬碟/my-project
 exited 2 in 0ms:
     1	#!/bin/bash
     2	# PostToolUse hook: catch 4 classes of token hygiene / cross-OS violations on component/pattern tsx edits.
     3	#
     4	# Detects (ALL are silent-fail or cross-OS drift bug classes per CLAUDE.md):
     5	# 1. shadcn compat alias 回流 — bg-popover / text-muted-foreground / bg-accent / text-accent-foreground / text-popover-foreground / bg-destructive / bg-background / bg-card / border-input / text-primary-foreground
     6	#    (these are shadcn safety-net aliases; our DS code MUST use direct tokens)
     7	# 2. Tailwind v4 `[--foo]` shorthand — must be `var(--foo)` wrapped; historical bug:
     8	#    Sidebar's `w-[--sidebar-width]` broke 8 places (silent fail, no error)
     9	# 3. Hardcoded Tailwind shadow — `shadow-sm/md/lg/xl/2xl` is forbidden; must use `shadow-[var(--elevation-N)] N∈{100,200,300}`
    10	# 4. Native overflow-{auto,scroll} without ScrollArea — cross-OS scrollbar drift
    11	#    (macOS overlay 不吃寬 / Windows always-visible 吃 17px = 跨 OS 跑版)
    12	#    應改用 ScrollArea(Components/ScrollArea/)— overlay scrollbar 跨 OS 一致
    13	#
    14	# WARN-style (not BLOCK): hook emits additionalContext so AI reads and can fix in next iteration.
    15	
    16	# Per-hook fire logging(enables /knowledge-prune D2 dead-hook detection)
    17	source "$(dirname "$0")/../_log-fire.sh" 2>/dev/null && log_hook_fire
    18	
    19	FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty')
    20	
    21	# Scope: only design-system component / pattern .tsx files (not stories, not specs)
    22	if ! echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'packages/design-system/src/(components|patterns)/.*\.tsx$'; then
    23	  exit 0
    24	fi
    25	if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.stories\.tsx$'; then
    26	  exit 0
    27	fi
    28	if [ ! -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then
    29	  exit 0
    30	fi
    31	
    32	VIOLATIONS=""
    33	
    34	# ── Check 1: shadcn compat alias 回流 ─────────────────────────────────────────
    35	# These are all shadcn safety-net aliases. Our code must use direct tokens instead.
    36	# bg-muted / bg-secondary / ring-ring are OUR tokens (kept), not listed here.
    37	SHADCN_PATTERN='\b(bg-popover|text-popover-foreground|text-muted-foreground|bg-accent|text-accent-foreground|bg-destructive|bg-background|bg-card|text-card-foreground|border-input|text-primary-foreground)\b'
    38	SHADCN_HITS=$(grep -nE "$SHADCN_PATTERN" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
    39	if [ -n "$SHADCN_HITS" ]; then
    40	  VIOLATIONS="${VIOLATIONS}\n⚠️ shadcn compat alias found (必須遷移為 direct token):\n${SHADCN_HITS}\n  映射: bg-popover→bg-surface-raised / text-popover-foreground→text-foreground / text-muted-foreground→text-fg-muted / bg-accent→bg-neutral-hover / text-accent-foreground→text-foreground / bg-destructive→bg-error / bg-background→bg-canvas / bg-card→bg-surface / border-input→border-border / text-primary-foreground→text-white"
    41	fi
    42	
    43	# ── Check 2: Tailwind v4 [--foo] shorthand (silent fail) ─────────────────────
    44	# Arbitrary-value class 引用 CSS variable 必須 var() 包覆,不能 [--foo] shorthand.
    45	# Matches: w-[--foo], h-[--bar-baz], shadow-[--elevation-100] 等
    46	# False positive exclusion: [&[data-...]] / [&:hover] 等 arbitrary variants (open bracket 後跟 & 或冒號)
    47	TWV4_PATTERN='\[--[a-z][a-z0-9-]*\]'
    48	TWV4_HITS=$(grep -nE "$TWV4_PATTERN" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '\[&' | head -5)
    49	if [ -n "$TWV4_HITS" ]; then
    50	  VIOLATIONS="${VIOLATIONS}\n⚠️ Tailwind v4 [--foo] shorthand found (silent fail,必須 var() 包覆):\n${TWV4_HITS}\n  修法:將 [--foo] 改為 [var(--foo)]"
    51	fi
    52	
    53	# ── Check 3: Hardcoded Tailwind shadow ────────────────────────────────────────
    54	# shadow-sm/md/lg/xl/2xl 是 Tailwind 預設,繞過 elevation token 系統——禁止.
    55	# 允許:shadow-none / shadow-[var(--elevation-N)] N∈{100,200,300} / shadow-[calc(...)]
    56	SHADOW_PATTERN='\bshadow-(sm|md|lg|xl|2xl|inner)\b'
    57	SHADOW_HITS=$(grep -nE "$SHADOW_PATTERN" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
    58	if [ -n "$SHADOW_HITS" ]; then
    59	  VIOLATIONS="${VIOLATIONS}\n⚠️ Tailwind default shadow found (禁用,必須用 elevation token):\n${SHADOW_HITS}\n  修法:shadow-sm→shadow-[var(--elevation-100)] / shadow-md→shadow-[var(--elevation-200)] / shadow-lg→shadow-[var(--elevation-300)]"
    60	fi
    61	
    62	# ── Check 4: primitive color name used as Tailwind utility (silent fail) ─────
    63	# Primitive tokens (`--color-neutral-N` / `--color-blue-N` 等) 只在 :root 宣告,
    64	# 沒經 semantic.css 的 `@theme inline` 橋接 → 寫 `bg-neutral-3` / `text-blue-6`
    65	# 當 Tailwind utility 會 silent 失效(class 編譯後不生成任何規則)。
    66	# 正確:用 semantic utility(bg-secondary / bg-muted)或 arbitrary value
    67	# `bg-[var(--color-neutral-3)]`(Tag categorical 色常用)。
    68	# 歷史 bug:2026-04-22 FileItem compact static bg 用 `bg-neutral-3` 完全沒底色,
    69	# user 對照 Badge low 可見才發現;spec layer + 本 hook 同步修。
    70	PRIMITIVE_PATTERN='\b(bg|text|border|ring|fill|stroke|shadow|outline|decoration|divide|placeholder|caret|accent)-(neutral|blue|red|green|yellow|orange|purple|pink|cyan|teal|indigo|violet|deep-orange)-[0-9]+\b'
    71	PRIMITIVE_HITS=$(grep -nE "$PRIMITIVE_PATTERN" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
    72	if [ -n "$PRIMITIVE_HITS" ]; then
    73	  VIOLATIONS="${VIOLATIONS}\n⚠️ Primitive color name used as Tailwind utility (silent fail):\n${PRIMITIVE_HITS}\n  修法:改用 semantic utility(bg-secondary / bg-muted / bg-surface / text-fg-muted 等)或 arbitrary value(bg-[var(--color-neutral-3)] 給 Tag categorical 色用)。理由:primitive token 沒經 @theme inline 橋接,bg-neutral-3 等會 silent 失效。"
    74	fi
    75	
    76	# ── Check 5: native overflow-{auto,scroll} without ScrollArea ─────────────────
    77	# 在 component / pattern .tsx 裡 raw overflow-auto / overflow-scroll =
    78	# 跨 OS scrollbar 不一致(macOS overlay / Windows always-visible 吃 17px)。
    79	# 應改用 ScrollArea(Components/ScrollArea/)。
    80	# 允許:horizontal-overflow pattern(有 scrollbar-none / fade-mask 特殊 UX)/
    81	#      use-overflow-items hook consumers(Tabs/ChipGroup hiding scroll)
    82	OVERFLOW_PATTERN='\boverflow-(auto|scroll|x-auto|x-scroll|y-auto|y-scroll)\b'
    83	OVERFLOW_HITS=$(grep -nE "$OVERFLOW_PATTERN" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE 'scrollbar-none|useOverflow|horizontal-overflow' | head -5)
    84	if [ -n "$OVERFLOW_HITS" ]; then
    85	  VIOLATIONS="${VIOLATIONS}\n⚠️ Native overflow-auto/scroll found (可能造成跨 OS 跑版):\n${OVERFLOW_HITS}\n  考慮改用 ScrollArea(\`@/design-system/components/ScrollArea/scroll-area\`)取得跨 OS 一致 overlay 捲軸。例外:刻意隱藏捲軸(scrollbar-none)+ fade-mask UX 屬 horizontal-overflow pattern,不套用本規則。"
    86	fi
    87	
    88	# ── Emit warning if any violation found ────────────────────────────────────
    89	if [ -n "$VIOLATIONS" ]; then
    90	  # Escape for JSON (newlines)
    91	  ESCAPED=$(printf "%b" "$VIOLATIONS" | jq -Rs .)
    92	  cat <<EOJSON
    93	{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Token hygiene 檢查發現違規 (CLAUDE.md 明文禁止項):${ESCAPED}\n\n這些是 silent-fail bug classes——不會造成 compile error,但 runtime 視覺或行為會壞。下個 Edit 回去修。"}}
    94	EOJSON
    95	fi

   342	    // 若 story load 失敗,Storybook 顯示 error。用 `#error-message` 有實際 text 偵測,

   354	
   355	    // ── axe-core a11y scan(2026-04-25,補 WCAG floor canonical 自動化)──
   356	    // Canonical ladder(`# 稽核 canonical` 節)排序 WCAG 為 mechanical floor,但允許
   357	    // DS spec documented exemption(incidental text / disabled / logotype / decorative)。
   358	    // axe-core 不知 exemption,會誤報合法 disabled text 為 color-contrast violation。
   359	    // 策略:disable axe `color-contrast`(Layer A `scanContrast` 已管含 exemption 邏輯),
   360	    // 保留 axe 其他規則(aria-label / label-association / focus / landmark 等 axe 特長)。
   361	    let a11yViolations = []
   362	    if (!opts.noA11y) {
   363	      try {
   364	        const axe = await new AxeBuilder({ page })
   365	          .withTags(['wcag2a', 'wcag2aa', 'wcag21a', 'wcag21aa'])
   366	          .disableRules([
   367	            // Layer A scanContrast 已覆蓋且知 canonical ladder exemption;axe 無 exemption 會
   368	            // 誤報 disabled/incidental text
   369	            'color-contrast',
   370	            // Radix portal 開啟時對 trigger 容器設 aria-hidden=true,其內 focusable 不 DOM-
   371	            // hide(Radix canonical a11y pattern:screen reader 靠 aria-hidden 跳過,鍵盤由
   372	            // focus trap 控)。axe 過度 flag,已知社群 false positive(axe-core issue #3259)。
   373	            'aria-hidden-focus',
   374	          ])

   376	        a11yViolations = axe.violations.map((v) => ({
   377	          id: v.id,
   378	          impact: v.impact,
   379	          description: v.description,
   380	          help: v.help,
   381	          nodes: v.nodes.length,
   382	        }))
   383	      } catch (axeErr) {
   384	        a11yViolations = [{ id: '_axe-error', impact: 'unknown', description: axeErr.message }]
   385	      }
   386	    }

   301	async function auditScenario(browser, scenario, opts = {}) {
   302	  // deviceScaleFactor 預設 1(非 retina)— 2x retina 會讓 snapshot 寬度達 2880px,
   303	  // 超過 AI sub-agent 的 image-dimension 限制(2000px),導致 Layer B 跑不了。

   544	  let totalA11yViolations = 0
   545	  let totalDiffBudgetBreached = 0

    60	      const density = (context.globals.density ?? 'md') as string;
    61	
    62	      useEffect(() => {
    63	        document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme);
    64	        document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-density', density);

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba .claude/references/structural-token-retention.md | sed -n '1,35p'" in /Users/chenqiren/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-qijenchen@gmail.com/我的雲端硬碟/my-project
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	# 結構性保留 token canonical(audit Dim 48 SSOT,2026-05-17 codified)
     2	
     3	某些 token 看起來「0 consumer」但屬**結構性保留**,不該 retire。**Sub-agent 跑 audit Dim 48 抓 0-consumer candidate 時必先過此 table,屬下列 6 類則 retract finding(不列為 violation)**。
     4	
     5	## 6 類結構性保留(對齊 Radix Color / Atlassian @atlaskit/tokens / Polaris polaris-tokens 三家共識)
     6	
     7	| 類別 | Examples | 保留 rationale |
     8	|---|---|---|
     9	| **1. Radix-style palette completeness** | `--color-{blue,deep-orange,orange,amber,yellow,lime,green,turquoise,indigo,purple,magenta}-{3,4,5,8,9,10}` / `--white-a{12,15,25,45,65,85}` / `--color-red-{1..10}`(red palette 因 semantic 重映射 deep-orange 而不直接消費)| Radix Color idiom 必 12 步階完整,即使目前只消費 step-{1,2,6,7} 給 Tag/Avatar,中間步階保留供未來 hue scale 擴充 / hue calibration 對照。Retire = 破壞 palette 完整契約,新加 hue 時需重新訂全套 |
    10	| **2. Forward-looking consumer reservation** | `--brand` / `--color-brand` | 預留給 consumer-layer(`src/app` / product UI)消費的品牌色 token。DS 本身不消費,跟 `--primary`(DS UI accent)分層。Retire = 未來產品做品牌頁時要重補 token + spec |
    11	| **3. Tailwind bridge alias to semantic state SOP** | `--color-warning-foreground` / `--color-status-{online,busy,away,offline}` / `--color-inverse-neutral-{hover,active}` | `@theme inline` bridge 讓 `bg-status-online` 類 utility 可用,即使現有 code 走 `var(--status-online)` direct(NameCard.tsx / Avatar.tsx / Tag.tsx 實際消費 underlying token 非 alias)。Bridge 是 future-proof Tailwind class consumption,retire = 限縮使用方式 |
    12	| **4. State SOP 5 件套** | `--info-active / --success-active / --warning-active / --primary-text` 等 | semantic state 5 件套(base / hover / active / subtle / text)結構完整性,即使現有 active variant 無 consumer,保留供未來互動 state 擴充 |
    13	| **5. Type scale completeness** | `--font-h1-size` / `--font-h4-size` 等 typography utility | Type scale 12-tier completeness,即使現有 production 只用 h2/h3/h5,h1/h4/h6 預留供 marketing / hero / drawer title 等場景 |
    14	| **6. Elevation dark-mode pair** | `--elevation-100-hover / --elevation-200-hover` | `primitives.css:236,238,419,421` light + dark 雙模式各自定義 → 結構性 dual-tier,retire 會破 dark mode visual contract |
    15	
    16	## Retire criteria 真實 strict(只有以下才 retire)
    17	
    18	- 真實 0 consumer + **0 forward-looking reservation** + **0 dark-mode pair** + **0 palette completeness role**
    19	- 對齊 Radix Color / Atlassian `@atlaskit/tokens` / Polaris polaris-tokens 三家 retire 政策共識
    20	
    21	## Sub-agent 強制 triple-verify before propose retire
    22	
    23	對每 candidate retire token,sub-agent 必 verify 3 layer:
    24	
    25	1. **`grep -rn var(--TOKEN_NAME)` DS-wide**(含 `packages/design-system/src/**` + `src/app/**` + `src/explorations/**`)— 抓 direct `var()` consumption
    26	2. **`grep -rn "TOKEN_NAME"` 排除 css/spec.md 定義 + template literal usage**(eg. `\`h-table-row-${size}\``)— 抓動態 utility class generation
    27	3. **Cross-check 上 6 類**:屬任一 → retract finding,**不列 retire candidate**
    28	
    29	**任一 layer 顯示「有 consumer / 屬結構保留」→ 從 retire report 中拿掉**(不要送 user 拍板浪費時間)。
    30	
    31	## Audit Dim 48 false-positive 經驗(2026-05-17,user 抓教訓)
    32	
    33	Sub-agent 用 narrow grep(只看 utility class hit,沒看 `var()` direct + template literal + dark mode override + forward-looking)抓 58 個 retire candidate;Layer A own re-verify 後 100% 為 false positive(全是結構性保留)。
    34

    14	**New invariant**(取代原 3-step 鐵律):**每次 codex collab 必走 5-step,不論最後 agree 或 disagree**:
    15	
    16	| Step | Claude action | Codex action | 共通 invariant |
    17	|---|---|---|---|
    18	| 1 各自熟讀 | grep / read spec.md / canonical / source 真讀 | `exec -s read-only` grep / git show | M29 anchor pre-grep / M23 既有 canonical |
    19	| 2 各自驗證 | `npx tsc -b` + invariant + audit | `exec` 跑 grep / git show / file inspect | M20 claim-verify gap |
    20	| 3 各自視覺稽核 | playwright screenshot + DOM + pixel audit | code-read + diff + grep visual path | user directive 強制 |
    21	| 4 各自 cite-based propose | 3-column:`spec.md path:line / 引文 / reasoning` | 同上獨立 | M22 cite mandate |
    22	| 5 整合完美版本 | agree → synthesize;disagree → cite battle | 同上 | **絕禁 pass-through** |
    23	
    24	**Hook 機械強制**:`check_codex_collab_5step.sh`(PreToolUse Bash git commit)— commit message 含 codex/Layer A/B keyword 必同含 (a) spec.md cite + (b) verify keyword + (c) verdict keyword。缺任一 stderr 警告(P1 soft)。Allow `@codex-collab-allow:` 緊急豁免。
    56	**Every collab with codex (or any 2nd-opinion reviewer) MUST be dual-track**:
    57	1. **Layer A**:Claude 跑自己一版完整分析(SKILL Step 0.5)
    58	2. **Layer B**:Codex 跑他一版(SKILL Step 1-4)
    59	3. **Layer C**:Claude 比稿 — 取優點 / 棄缺點 → final synthesized 方案(SKILL Step 5)
    60	
    61	**禁止**:
    62	- Pass-through(paste codex 結論 + 列 A/B/C 問 user)
    63	- Single-track(只我一版 OR 只 codex 一版)
    64	- 省工(eg. 「codex 已查所以我不查」— 不允許)
    11	**任何要 user 拍板的提案(A/B/C 選一字 / 投票 / 拍板)必用「具體中文人話」**,禁術語/代號:
    12	
    13	❌ **禁用 jargon**:
    14	- 「M14 trait-content backfill」「Dim 44 title 重分類」「D12 placeholder fix」
    15	- 「SSOT-affecting」「@watch tag」「OpenSnapshot」「Layer A own」
    16	- 「spec frontmatter `hasSizes` declared 卻 empty stub」
    17	- 任何沒中譯的縮寫 / 內部代號 / hook 名
    18	
    19	✅ **必含 3 段**:
    20	1. **發生什麼**(中文具體,user 視角看到的現象,e.g.「Storybook 文件給 designer 看時 Sidebar 的尺寸表是空的」)
    21	2. **影響是什麼**(中文具體,user-visible consequence,e.g.「designer 不知道 Sidebar 有哪些尺寸,只能猜」)
    22	3. **選項各自結果**(中文具體 outcome,e.g.「選 A:我幫你列出所有尺寸 + 何時用 / 選 B:你先指定 6 個元件分別要列什麼」)

codex
以下是 Codex Phase B 獨立稽核證據版，未改檔。

### Codex Phase B Audit

- **P0 — audit SSOT 本身漂移**：`design-system-audit` 同檔同時寫「Runs 46 audit dimensions」與「53 dimensions」：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:3,6,34`。這違反 `deep-audit-cross-codex`「禁 hardcode dim count、只 chain design-system-audit SSOT」：`.claude/skills/deep-audit-cross-codex/SKILL.md:9-13`。另 `audit-prompts.md` 標題仍是「22 audits」且重複 `21/22/23`，最後只到 `51`，缺 `52/53` prompt：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1,696,754,792,814,846,889,1183,1189`；但 SSOT 已定義 Dim 52/53：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:170-173`。

- **P0 — preflight coverage 對新增 hook 失守**：preflight log 明確寫 `coverageGaps: 2`，quote: `hook:dim_count_drift` / `hook:propose_pre_grep_verify` unmapped：`.claude/logs/audit-preflight-2026-05-17.json:19-23`。這兩個 hook 已註冊：`.claude/settings.json:237-243`，但 `principle-dim-map.json` hooks map 沒對應 entry：`.claude/references/principle-dim-map.json:56-82`。這正中 user 原話的「SSOT integrity / 下次不再犯」。

- **P1 — Tailwind utility registry 宣稱有 hook，實際仍只查 opacity**：Dim 47 要 `check_tailwind_token_registry.sh` 讀 `utility-registry.json`：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:165`；registry 也宣稱 consumed_by hook：`packages/design-system/src/tokens/utility-registry.json:4-9`，且定義 blocked utilities：`packages/design-system/src/tokens/utility-registry.json:42-59,79-84`。但實際註冊仍是 `check_opacity_token_usage.sh`：`.claude/settings.json:217-220`，該 hook 內容只 grep `opacity-[0-9]+`：`.claude/hooks/check_opacity_token_usage.sh:3-14,38-40`；`_token_hygiene` 也未讀 registry：`.claude/hooks/lib/_token_hygiene.sh:34-85`。

- **P1 — 30 個 Anatomy Accessibility story 直接輸出 TODO 佔位**：共同 quote 是「`[TODO] 本元件 spec.md 尚無「## A11y 預設」段。後續補:ARIA role / keyboard map / focus 行為。`」。命中：Menu:777, Breadcrumb:453, HoverCard:142, Switch:218, Select:814, DropdownMenu:965, Chip:419, PeoplePicker:404, Field:517, NumberInput:783, NameCard:499, Input:747, SegmentedControl:292, TreeView:403, OverflowIndicator:532, DataTable:525, Sheet:264, Steps:443, Notice:607, SelectMenu:807, Textarea:285, Button:706, Slider:232, Calendar:214, SelectionControl:568, LinkInput:743, RadioGroup:677, Checkbox:623, Tabs:411, Tooltip:410。違反 placeholder 禁令：`.claude/rules/story-rules.md:49-51`；互動元件 spec 必有 A11y 段：`.claude/rules/spec-rules.md:20`；Accessibility story 必含 ARIA / Keyboard / Focus / WCAG：`.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:133-148`；Dim45 也要求 ARIA hint / keyboard map：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:158`。

- **P1 — Dim51 theme/density/RTL matrix 被宣稱但 visual-audit CLI 不支援**：Dim51 要 light/dark/high-contrast/density-md/density-lg/RTL matrix：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:169`，prompt 寫要跑 `--matrix=theme-density-rtl`：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1189-1193`。但 `visual-audit.mjs` 只解析 `--auto-start/--headed/--retina/--scope/--urls/--no-a11y/--no-diff/--update-baseline`，沒有 matrix：`scripts/visual-audit.mjs:61-68`；Storybook globals 雖有 theme/density：`.storybook/preview.tsx:57-65`，但 screenshot URL 沒帶 globals：`scripts/visual-audit.mjs:311-315`。

- **P1 — code-quality audit 有 false-positive 會污染報告**：script 用 naive regex 找 `function|const`，且只看 marker 前 3 行：`scripts/code-quality-audit.mjs:130-139`；P1 push 依 `bodyLen > budget`：`scripts/code-quality-audit.mjs:153-160`。但 Tabs marker 在 242、命中在 247，超出 3 行；實際 `registerItem` 只有小 callback：`packages/design-system/src/components/Tabs/tabs.tsx:242-253`。Chip 同樣 marker 在 220、命中在 225：`packages/design-system/src/components/Chip/chip.tsx:220-231`。

- **P1 — `audit-preflight --check` 宣稱只 exit code，實際仍寫 log**：usage quote「`--check # 只 exit code,不 dump JSON`」：`scripts/audit-preflight.mjs:15-18`；但程式無條件 `fs.writeFileSync(logPath...)`：`scripts/audit-preflight.mjs:138-143`。治理 hook 又在 check mode 呼叫它：`.claude/hooks/lib/_governance_coverage_check.sh:28-29`。

- **P2 — Dim50 per-component bundle budget 仍是 deferred**：Dim50 要 per component gzip size + manifest：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:168`；目前 `package.json` 只有 app bundle / CSS 兩個總量 budget：`package.json:95-108`。

- **P2 — ScrollArea anatomy hardcoded color 是 severity 待釐清，不可直接 P0**：目前仍有 `style={{ color: '#2d6a9f' }}`：`packages/design-system/src/components/ScrollArea/scroll-area.anatomy.stories.tsx:193`。但 Dim5 prompt 明確排除 story/anatomy files：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:198-202`；若 Phase A 把 anatomy raw color 當 P0，SSOT 需要先同步清楚。

### 跟 Claude Phase A 對照

- **Claude 抓 + 我不同意**：無 confirmed disagreement。Phase A 已落地項多數現況吻合：`inline-action` 只剩一個「被引用」段：`packages/design-system/src/patterns/element-anatomy/inline-action.spec.md:300`；reverse pointer 有 `button.spec.md`：`packages/design-system/src/patterns/element-anatomy/inline-action.spec.md:306`；FieldControlGroup N/A rationale 已寫：`packages/design-system/src/components/FieldControlGroup/field-control-group.anatomy.stories.tsx:1-4`。但 ScrollArea severity 有上面 P2 待釐清。

- **你抓 + Claude 漏**：audit SSOT drift、preflight unmapped hooks、Tailwind registry hook 未落地、30 個 A11y TODO、Dim51 matrix CLI 缺口、code-quality false-positive、`audit-preflight --check` 寫檔，以上均已列 cite。

- **兩邊都漏的盲區**：稽核工具自身也要被稽核。現在 `audit-prompts.md` 可以讓流程口頭說「53 dim」，但 dispatch prompt 實際缺 52/53；preflight 可以發現 gap，卻又在 check mode 產生副作用。這不是元件 bug，是 audit pipeline integrity bug。

### 真理由 Disagreement

- **A11y story/content pass vs 我不同意**：Claude Phase A 摘要稱 story/content/a11y 類多數 PASS；我立場是「30 個 TODO placeholder 不能算 PASS」。本地 SSOT 已明定 ARIA / Keyboard / Focus / WCAG：`.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:133-141`。世界級對照也支持：Atlassian 說 ADS 元件有 keyboard support / ARIA，仍需 review patterns end-to-end；Polaris 說 component reuse improves accessibility，但仍要測 task flow / focus / keyboard；Carbon Tabs 文件直接列 keyboard interactions、ARIA、測試狀態；Storybook 官方也把 axe a11y test 當 first-line QA。
tokens used
420,238
以下是 Codex Phase B 獨立稽核證據版，未改檔。

### Codex Phase B Audit

- **P0 — audit SSOT 本身漂移**：`design-system-audit` 同檔同時寫「Runs 46 audit dimensions」與「53 dimensions」：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:3,6,34`。這違反 `deep-audit-cross-codex`「禁 hardcode dim count、只 chain design-system-audit SSOT」：`.claude/skills/deep-audit-cross-codex/SKILL.md:9-13`。另 `audit-prompts.md` 標題仍是「22 audits」且重複 `21/22/23`，最後只到 `51`，缺 `52/53` prompt：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/references/audit-prompts.md:1,696,754,792,814,846,889,1183,1189`；但 SSOT 已定義 Dim 52/53：`.claude/skills/design-system-audit/SKILL.md:170-173`。

- **P0 — preflight coverage 對新增 hook 失守**：preflight log 明確寫 `coverageGaps: 2`，quote: `hook:dim_count_drift` / `hook:propose_pre_grep_verify` unmapped：`.claude/logs/audit-preflight-2026-05-17.json:19-23`。這兩個 hook 已註冊：`.claude/settings.json:237-243`，但 `principle-dim-map.json` hooks map 沒對應 entry：`.claude/references/principle-dim-map.json:56-82`。這正中 user 原話的「SSOT integrity / 下次不再犯」。

### 跟 Claude Phase A 對照

- **Claude 抓 + 我不同意**：無 confirmed disagreement。Phase A 已落地項多數現況吻合：`inline-action` 只剩一個「被引用」段：`packages/design-system/src/patterns/element-anatomy/inline-action.spec.md:300`；reverse pointer 有 `button.spec.md`：`packages/design-system/src/patterns/element-anatomy/inline-action.spec.md:306`；FieldControlGroup N/A rationale 已寫：`packages/design-system/src/components/FieldControlGroup/field-control-group.anatomy.stories.tsx:1-4`。但 ScrollArea severity 有上面 P2 待釐清。

### 真理由 Disagreement

- **A11y story/content pass vs 我不同意**：Claude Phase A 摘要稱 story/content/a11y 類多數 PASS；我立場是「30 個 TODO placeholder 不能算 PASS」。本地 SSOT 已明定 ARIA / Keyboard / Focus / WCAG：`.claude/skills/story-writing/references/anatomy-standard.md:133-141`。世界級對照也支持：Atlassian 說 ADS 元件有 keyboard support / ARIA，仍需 review patterns end-to-end；Polaris 說 component reuse improves accessibility，但仍要測 task flow / focus / keyboard；Carbon Tabs 文件直接列 keyboard interactions、ARIA、測試狀態；Storybook 官方也把 axe a11y test 當 first-line QA。
